description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Give your study a title' page to proceed.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button while the study title 'TV Streaming - Discovery' is entered.

description: The application navigates from the study title setup to the research method selection page.
User selects 'Video Call' as the moderated research method.
page_title: How will you be conducting your research?
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Video Call' option, which is highlighted with a blue selection border.

description: The application navigates to the 'Device requirements' setup page.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the research method selection to the device requirements selection.
